title: The Selfish Princess Awakens
overview: The selfish crown princess changes for the better, her newfound precognition deemed the cause. Yet her father and the others don’t know the truth: she had been reincarnated.

title: The Villainous Princess Makes a Request of Her Brother
overview: Someday Stale will avenge his mother. He will get it done no matter what. If only he could remember the dream he had, would that help?

title: The Heretical Princess and the Knights
overview: When a military exercise goes wrong, Pride must spare no effort to ensure everyone returns alive.

title: The Worst Princess and the Young Man's Vow
overview: In another life, Pride's callousness resulted in tragedy and a powerful enemy. But in this life, her compassion saved those fated to die and earned her an unexpected ally.

title: The Wicked Princess and the Sword
overview: Arthur abandoned his dream to be a knight due to his embarrassing special ability. Inspired by Pride’s actions, he embraces his ambition once again.

title: The Selfish Princess Passes Judgment
overview: Heavy is the head that wears the crown. Pride must prove her mettle as the future queen by passing judgment on an enemy, but she worries this will set her on the road to ruin.

title: The Coldhearted Princess and the Quitter
overview: What would drive someone to desperation? The answer is as simple as it is old as time: love.

title: The Insolent Princess and the Judgment
overview: Arthur’s power to grow crops is absolutely worthless for a knight. Or is it? Pride’s actions are about to change multiple lives forever.

title: The Cruel Princess and the Criminal
overview: Pride once told a criminal to seek her out if he was ever faced with an impossible situation. That day has finally come.

title: The Coldhearted Princess Sneaks In
overview: Pride and her friends hatch a daring plan to rescue the kidnapped children.

title: The Merciless Princess and the Order
overview: Val won’t leave anyone behind, even at the cost of his life. This time, Pride’s precognition cannot help her; this crisis has never happened before.

title: The Treacherous Princess Faces the Future
overview: Pride has changed many lives for the better, but is it truly enough to escape her destiny? She doesn’t believe so. Regardless, that won’t stop her from helping others.

title: The Cruel Queen and the Fiance
overview: The queen announces Pride's engagement on her 16th birthday. It may seem like the perfect match, but Pride knows it's anything but a fairy tale.

title: The Cruel Queen Speaks
overview: Pride knows what lies in store for Leon, and she is determined to safeguard her fiance's happiness. However, Pride's friends worry that she isn't safeguarding her own.

title: The Cruel Queen and the Truth
overview: Pride will not suffer a conspiracy aimed at Prince Leon.

title: The Cruel Queen Makes a Declaration
overview: With Leon and the Anemone Kingdom destined to fall into ruin, Pride confronts the conspirators directly.

title: The Cruel Queen Takes Notice, and is Noticed
